tluaDottedFunctionShadowing.tlua(16,16): error TLUA2339: Property 'first' does not exist on type '{ second(): number; }'.


==== tluaDottedFunctionShadowing.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local M = {};
    
    function M.first(): number
      return 1;
    end
    
    local firstOnly = M.first();
    
    local M = {};
    
    function M.second(): number
      return 2;
    end
    
    local secondOnly = M.second();
    local gone = M.first();
                   ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'first' does not exist on type '{ second(): number; }'.
